temporal_description: (00:00-00:05) A man with longish brown hair, wearing a red plaid shirt under a dark red corduroy jacket, walks down a narrow, dimly lit hallway. The walls are covered in a dated, patterned yellow wallpaper. He has a wide, unsettling, and slightly manic grin on his face as he approaches the camera, which is positioned at the end of the hall. (Storyline: This opening shot introduces a character who appears unstable and menacing, creating an immediate sense of unease and suspense.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A high-pitched, screeching, and distorted sound effect plays, building tension and creating a jarring, horror-like atmosphere.)
